name: chapter-pilot
description: Browser extension for chapter navigation, reading progress, URL repair, site mapping and focused manga reading.

scripts.build: bun build src/entries/background.ts --outfile background.js --target browser --format iife && bun build src/entries/content.ts --outfile content.js --target browser --format iife && bun build src/entries/options.ts --outfile options.js --target browser --format iife && bun build src/entries/popup.ts --outfile popup.js --target browser --format iife && bun build src/entries/continue.ts --outfile continue.js --target browser --format iife
